case_title: POL PLA I CONESA VS. UNION HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70752480) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONESA, POL PLA I AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE PLA FAMILY TRUST DATED MAY 6, 2021 AS TO DEFENDANT UNION HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1-10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-31-2024 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-30-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-08-2024
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 71384761) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT UNION HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT GROUP, LLC
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-15-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF POL PLA CONESA NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO SHOW THAT HE FACES IMMINENT IRREPARABLE HARM FROM THE CONDITION IN THE CONDOMINIUM UNIT OR THAT HE LACKS AN EFFECTIVE REMEDY AT LAW. FURTHERMORE, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ATTACH A PROPOSED ORDER WITH THEIR MOVING PAPERS THAT WOULD ALLOW THE COURT TO DISCERN HIS EXACT REQUESTED RELIEF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; COURT REPORTER: JANE HONG, CSR #11975, CSRJANE@HOTMAIL.COM, 909-831-2644 (D501)

Off Calendar Jan-18-2024 Set For Trial On Nov-18-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Scott A. Freedman; Zacks & Freedman, PC; 415-956-8100; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Pol Pla I Conesa.
Austin D. Garner; Law Offices of Scott C. Stratman; 510-457-3440; appearing as counsel for defendants Union Homeowners Association and Citiscape Property Management Group, LLC.
Stephen Poirier; McLeod Law Group; 619-236-9938; appearing as counsel for defendant Union Homeowners Association.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF POL PLA CONESA NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff fails to show that he faces imminent irreparable harm from the condition in the condominium unit or that he lacks an effective remedy at law. Furthermore, Plaintiff has failed to attach a proposed order with their moving papers that would allow the Court to discern his exact requested relief.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Jane Hong, CSR #11975, CSRJane@hotmail.com, 909-831-2644 (D501)
